series_metadata.series_description: This series contains: copies of pre-approval letters which grant user agencies covered by State Term Contracts a number so that they can use the contract programmers. Included with this are working papers and copies of correspondence. All orignal mater

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for 1 fiscal year, then transfer to storage for 4 fiscal years, then destroy provided all contract issues are settled., Paper: Wastepaper
